content: Fix Python `is` -> `==` for literal comparisons (5 locations across email_service, drive, registration)
Fix empty catch blocks in i18n-context.jsx (add console.error logging)
Hoist inline `accent` objects in Prizes.jsx to module-level constants
Replace array-index React keys with stable identifiers (Timeline, HowTo, Criteria, About)
Replace nested ternary in RegistrationForm submit button with clear if/else
Split email_service: extract build_message + send_message + smaller render helpers
Refactor Python register_entry: extract validate_registration, collect_song_inputs, process_song, send_notification_email
Refactor RegistrationForm: extract useRegistrationForm hook + ContactInfoCard + SongSubmissionCard + SuccessDialog sub-components
Fix React hook deps + add eslint-disable for intentional empty arrays in i18n-context, Navbar
Run final E2E backend curl + frontend lint after refactor to confirm no regressions
